---
title: "Runtime"
comments: false
toc: false
---

<p class="project-page-intro">
Inference runtime systems and serving engines for efficient model deployment.
</p>

<div class="project-stack">
  <!-- Add vLLM GitHub repo URL here -->
  <a class="project-row-card" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-row-title">vLLM</span>
    <span class="project-row-meta">Paged attention and high-throughput LLM serving</span>
  </a>

  <!-- Add SGLang GitHub repo URL here -->
  <a class="project-row-card" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-row-title">SGLang</span>
    <span class="project-row-meta">Structured generation and serving workflows</span>
  </a>

  <!-- Add TensorRT GitHub repo URL here -->
  <a class="project-row-card" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-row-title">TensorRT</span>
    <span class="project-row-meta">Optimized inference engines</span>
  </a>

  <!-- Add TensorRT-LLM GitHub repo URL here -->
  <a class="project-row-card" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-row-title">TensorRT-LLM</span>
    <span class="project-row-meta">LLM-specific serving and engine optimization</span>
  </a>
</div>
